hooks.command:
python -c "
import json, sys, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if 'docker-compose.yml' not in f:
    sys.exit(0)
with open('C:/Users/simon/github/tether/docker-compose.yml') as fh:
    compose = fh.read().rstrip()
with open('C:/Users/simon/github/tether/README.md') as fh:
    readme = fh.read()
def replacer(m):
    return m.group(1) + compose + '\n' + m.group(2)
new_readme = re.sub(r'(\x60\x60\x60yaml\n).*?(\x60\x60\x60)', replacer, readme, flags=re.DOTALL)
if new_readme != readme:
    with open('C:/Users/simon/github/tether/README.md', 'w') as fh:
        fh.write(new_readme)
" 2>/dev/null || true
